subject: A humanoid figure in leather armor writhes as violent blue-white arcane energy erupts around and through them, a spectral skull-like form visible in the energy above
description: A solo humanoid figure dominates the mid-shot frame, upper body and arms visible, twisting or recoiling as brilliant blue-white arcane energy surges in all directions around them. Both arms are raised, hands near the head, in a posture of intense magical exertion or pain — the face is contorted, mouth open. A ghostly skull-like shape floats in the churning energy above the figure's head. The figure wears layered leather armor or studded garb. The background is entirely consumed by roiling blue-white magical light and dark smoke. The impression is of raw magical force being violently channeled or endured.
foreground: humanoid figure in leather armor, arms raised, face contorted
background: roiling blue-white arcane energy, dark smoke
emotion: intense pain or exertion; contorted face, open mouth, arms raised in strain
